confidenceReason: Two independent sensors — the invariant suite and the reconciliation job — agree over the full window.
evidenceSummary: The property-based suite passes across all mutation paths and the nightly reconciliation sensor shows zero unexplained drift over the window.

basis.statement: Suite results and the reconciliation drift report were both read for the window.

findings.condition: The property-based suite passes for debit, credit, failed-write, and interleaved concurrent reversal paths, and the nightly reconciliation report shows zero unexplained drift for the four-week window.

criteria.criterion: Invariant and reconciliation sensors pass over the window with coverage beyond the required mutation paths.
criteria.rationale: This is the model's veto requirement; the sharpened unacceptable band is why two independent sensors are consulted.

effect.statement: The failure the model most exists to prevent shows no signal on either sensor, supporting an outstanding integrity rating.

evidence.statement: The drift report reads zero unexplained cents across all accounts for the window; the suite's concurrent-reversal properties passed 10,000 generated cases.

findings.statement: Balance invariants hold across every tested mutation path with zero reconciliation drift.

summary: The property-based suite passes across all mutation paths and the nightly reconciliation sensor shows zero unexplained drift over the window.
